parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json;
const domain = input.domain;
const productIdea = input.productIdea;
const audience = input.targetAudience;

const options = [
  {
    id: 'option-a',
    name: `${domain} — Focused MVP`,
    approach: 'Minimal viable product targeting the core pain point',
    description: `A lean solution focused on the single highest-value job-to-be-done: ${audience.jobsToBeDone[0]}. Ship fast, learn fast.`,
    targetAudience: audience.primary,
    monetization: 'Freemium with usage-based pricing',
    timeToMarket: '4-6 weeks',
    pros: [
      'Fast time to market',
      'Low initial investment',
      'Quick user feedback loop',
      'Easy to pivot based on learnings'
    ],
    cons: [
      'Limited feature set may not attract power users',
      'Risk of being outcompeted on features',
      'May need significant rework to scale'
    ],
    riskLevel: 'low',
    estimatedEffort: 'S-M'
  },
  {
    id: 'option-b',
    name: `${domain} — Platform Play`,
    approach: 'Full-featured platform with extensibility',
    description: `A comprehensive platform addressing all identified pain points: ${audience.painPoints.join('; ')}. Includes API for third-party integrations.`,
    targetAudience: `${audience.primary} and developers building on top`,
    monetization: 'Tiered subscription (Free / Pro / Enterprise)',
    timeToMarket: '10-14 weeks',
    pros: [
      'Comprehensive solution creates strong moat',
      'API/extensibility attracts developer ecosystem',
      'Multiple revenue streams',
      'Scalable architecture from day one'
    ],
    cons: [
      'Longer time to market',
      'Higher initial investment',
      'More complex to maintain',
      'Risk of over-engineering before product-market fit'
    ],
    riskLevel: 'medium',
    estimatedEffort: 'L-XL'
  },
  {
    id: 'option-c',
    name: `${domain} — Integration-First`,
    approach: 'Plugin/integration for existing popular platforms',
    description: `Instead of building standalone, integrate into tools users already use. Solve ${audience.jobsToBeDone[1]} within their existing workflow.`,
    targetAudience: `${audience.primary} who already use established platforms`,
    monetization: 'Per-seat license or marketplace listing',
    timeToMarket: '6-8 weeks',
    pros: [
      'Leverages existing user base of host platform',
      'Lower customer acquisition cost',
      'Users stay in familiar environment',
      'Reduced infrastructure costs'
    ],
    cons: [
      'Dependent on host platform policies',
      'Limited by host platform capabilities',
      'Revenue share with marketplace',
      'Less brand visibility'
    ],
    riskLevel: 'medium',
    estimatedEffort: 'M'
  }
];

const recommendation = {
  preferred: 'option-a',
  rationale: 'Start with focused MVP to validate product-market fit before committing to larger investments. Can evolve toward Option B or C based on user feedback.',
  nextSteps: [
    'Validate core assumption with 5 user interviews',
    'Build clickable prototype for Option A',
    'Define success metrics (activation, retention, NPS)',
    'Set go/no-go criteria for 4-week checkpoint'
  ]
};

return [{
  json: {
    ...input,
    options,
    recommendation
  }
}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'done', result: { productResearch: { domain: $json.domain, options: $json.options.map(o => ({ id: o.id, name: o.name, approach: o.approach, risk: o.riskLevel, effort: o.estimatedEffort })), recommendation: $json.recommendation, requirementCount: $json.requirements.functional.length + $json.requirements.nonFunctional.length, constraints: $json.requirements.constraints } } }) , "research_run_id": "={{ $('Store Research run_id').first().json.research_run_id }}" }

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: $json.success, workflow: $json.workflow, kind: $json.kind, status: $json.status, receivedAt: $json.receivedAt, result: typeof $json.result === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.result) : $json.result }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: $('Structure Requirements').first().json.searchQueries ? $('Structure Requirements').first().json.searchQueries.join('. ') : $('Parse Research Query').first().json.productIdea, mode: 'standard', domain_hint: 'product_comparison', trigger_source: 'hive', run_id: 'hive_' + $('Webhook Trigger').first().json.body.projectId + '_' + Date.now(), callback_webhook: 'http://localhost:5678/webhook/hive-research-done' }) }}
